---
name: Crash Report
about: Report a crash or app freeze
title: "[Crash] "
labels: crash
assignees: ''
---

## What happened?

A clear description of what you were doing when the crash or freeze occurred.

## Steps to reproduce

1. Open '...'
2. Tap '...'
3. App crashed / froze

## Is it reproducible?

- [ ] Happens every time
- [ ] Happens sometimes
- [ ] Happened once

## Crash / error information

> If you have a stack trace or logcat output, paste it here. You can capture logs with Android Studio or a logcat app.

```
(paste crash log or stack trace here)
```

## Device info

- **Device**: (e.g. Pixel 8, Samsung Galaxy S24)
- **Android version**: (e.g. Android 14)
- **YTune version**: (e.g. v1.8.0) — find this in **Settings → About**
- **Install source**: (APK from Releases / built from source)
- **Available storage**: (e.g. 4 GB free)
- **Signed in to Google**: (Yes / No)

## Additional context

Any other details that might help — were you on Wi-Fi or mobile data? Was the screen on or off?
